steps.title: Translate the percentage statement to an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 5% of w is 741.41 means:
$$0.05w = 741.41$$

steps.title: Solve for w by dividing both sides by 0.05
steps.content:
$$w = \frac{741.41}{0.05}$$
Dividing by 0.05 is equivalent to multiplying by 20:
$$w = 741.41 \times 20 = 14,828.2$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
